W2_5_life_event_stream.baseline: flag nobody (all detectable harm missed -> gap = 1)
W2_5_life_event_stream.note: harm-weighted fraction of detectable life-event distress the company MISSED (W2_5 hidden events -> observable payment disruption -> C7 detection); miss-only metric, blind to false positives.

W2_9_segment_debt_tnc.baseline: no-skill applier: always apply the majority class 'domestic_terms' (mis-serves 0.1004 of the population)
W2_9_segment_debt_tnc.note: fraction of arrears accounts on the WRONG-segment debt T&C (W2_9 true segment vs C11 applied-from-observed segment); a compliance/fairness gap driven by real onboarding segment misclassification, normalised to a blind majority-class applier.
